sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35483" key="e)nexurimai=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνεχῠρ-ιμαῖον</orth>, <sense id="n35483.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐνέχυρον</ref></xr>, censured by <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">342</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
